title: Parts Tree
excerpt:
How can I implement a parts tree? 
A product has parts (components), parts have parts, etc., etc. 
There could be many levels of a parts tree structure.

posts.author: alanhalley (Alan Halley)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I implement a parts tree?

A product has parts (components), parts have parts, etc., etc.

There could be many levels of a parts tree structure.

posts.author: ggozalova (Nay Gozalova)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Alan,

You can try having a board for each product. The component of the product would be your group name. Items under the group would be your main parts. Each part can have subparts as a subitem. This natively supports 4 layers. If you want to go one more layer down then in this case I recommend using an app called ‘unlimited subitems’ https://monday.com/marketplace/10000133

Hope this helps.
